ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cisco-Talos/clamav
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav
Language: c
ClamAV - Documentation is here: https://docs.clamav.net

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Next-Flip/Momentum-Firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Next-Flip/Momentum-Firmware
Language: c
🐬 Feature-rich, stable and customizable Flipper Firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OISF/suricata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OISF/suricata
Language: c
Suricata is a network Intrusion Detection System, Intrusion Prevention System and Network Security Monitoring engine developed by the OISF and the Suricata community.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/httpd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/httpd
Language: c
Mirror of Apache HTTP Server. Issues: http://issues.apache.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bol-van/zapret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bol-van/zapret
Language: c
DPI bypass multi platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dorianborian/sesame-robot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dorianborian/sesame-robot
Language: c
An open and affordable mini quadruped robot based on ESP32.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duixcom/Duix-Avatar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duixcom/Duix-Avatar
Language: c
🚀 Truly open-source AI avatar(digital human) toolkit for offline video generation and digital human cloning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: erincatto/box2d
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/erincatto/box2d
Language: c
Box2D is a 2D physics engine for games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: erincatto/box3d
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/erincatto/box3d
Language: c
Box3D is a 3D physics engine for games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glfw/glfw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glfw/glfw
Language: c
A multi-platform library for OpenGL, OpenGL ES, Vulkan, window and input

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obsproject/obs-studio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obsproject/obs-studio
Language: c
OBS Studio - Free and open source software for live streaming and screen recording

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwall/john
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwall/john
Language: c
John the Ripper jumbo - advanced offline password cracker, which supports hundreds of hash and cipher types, and runs on many operating systems, CPUs, GPUs, and even some FPGAs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pymumu/smartdns
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pymumu/smartdns
Language: c
A local DNS server to obtain the fastest website IP for the best Internet experience, support DoT, DoH, DoQ. 一个本地DNS服务器，获取最快的网站IP，获得最佳上网体验，支持DoH，DoT，DoQ。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: reactos/reactos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/reactos/reactos
Language: c
A free Windows-compatible Operating System

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tmux/tmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tmux/tmux
Language: c
tmux source code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
